introductions.pitch_30s: Hi, I'm Haolun. I focus on TypeScript full-stack development, mainly using Angular and NestJS. I am currently studying Computer Science at NCUT while working as an IT Intern and participating in web system development.
introductions.pitch_1min: Hi, I'm Haolun Wang. I'm currently studying Computer Science at NCUT while working as an IT Intern. On the technical side, I mainly focus on Angular Standalone architecture and NestJS backend development, and I use Docker to support deployment and development workflows. Most of my daily work centers on feature development, debugging, and system maintenance, where I continue building practical project experience.

items: Resume website built with Angular Standalone architecture, featuring bilingual (EN/ZH) switching and responsive layout. Version controlled via GitHub Repository and deployed using Cloudflare Pages & Workers.
Angular + NestJS full-stack development including API integration, deployment workflows, Git-based version control, and Docker containerization.

profile.name: 王顥倫
profile.title: 軟體工程師 / IT 實習生

introductions.pitch_30s: 你好，我是顥倫，專注於 TypeScript 全端開發，主要使用 Angular 與 NestJS。目前在勤益資工就讀，同時擔任 IT 實習生，持續參與 Web 系統開發。
introductions.pitch_1min: 你好，我是王顥倫。現階段在勤益資工就讀並擔任 IT 實習生。技術上以 Angular 獨立元件架構與 NestJS 後端開發為主，也使用 Docker 支援部署與開發流程。平時主要投入在功能開發、除錯與系統維護，累積可落地的專案經驗。

items: 履歷網站：使用 Angular Standalone 架構，實現中英切換、響應式設計；搭配 GitHub Repository 版控，透過 Cloudflare Pages & Workers 進行自動化部署。
Angular + NestJS 全端專案：實作 API 串接、Docker 容器化、Git 版本控管與完整的部署流程。
